models.title: Interconnect Cable for Dimmable Under Cabinet LED Lighting Fixtures - UC-I30
source_fields: Use this connector cable to join multiple 16.5" or 22" Dimmable Under-Cabinet LED Lighting Fixtures. The 18 AWG, 300V cord allows for 12" of added length between lights. Up to 10 LED lights can be connected in a series.

models.title: American Lighting Microlink Under Cabinet Light Bar, White, 3000K, 280 Lumens, 120V, Dimmable
source_fields:
American Lighting Microlink Under Cabinet Light — White & Feature SummaryThe MLINK-120-30-12 is a white under cabinet light bar designed for seamless integration into various lighting setups. Constructed with durable materials, this fixture measures 12in. in length and features an integrated LED light source operating at 120V.Key Features

Voltage: Operates at 120V AC for compatibility with standard electrical systems.

Wattage: Consumes 5 watts, providing energy-efficient lighting.

Lumens: Outputs 280 lumens for bright task lighting.

Color Temperature: Fixed at 3000K, offering a warm and inviting light.

CRI: High CRI of 90+ for accurate color rendering.

Lifespan: Rated for 50,000 hours, ensuring long-lasting performance.

Dimming: Dimmable from 5-100% with compatible dimmers.

Beam Angle: 120° for wide light distribution.

Linkability: Supports up to 65.6ft of continuous run.
Core Design & ProfileThis low-profile fixture features a sleek design with a diffused lens for smooth light distribution. It is dry-rated and suitable for indoor use.LED Illumination & PerformanceWith 280 lumens and a 5-watt power consumption, this fixture provides efficient lighting. The 3000K color temperature ensures a warm ambiance.Power, Wiring & LinkabilityThe fixture is designed for direct wire installation at 120V. It includes quick-connect accessories for easy linking, supporting up to 65.6ft of continuous run.Where This Fixture Works Best
Kitchen under cabinet lighting
Office task lighting
Retail display lighting
Workshop task lighting
Closet lighting
What's Included
One MLINK-120-CONKIT power connector kit
4in. mounting clips with screws
End cap

models.title: 5m White LED Strip Light - Even-Glow® Series - Fully Diffused LED Tape Light - 90+ High CRI - IP20 - 24V
models.category: White Flexible LED Strip Lights > COB LED Strip Lights > 24 Volt LED Strip Lights > High CRI LED Strip Lights > Flexible LED Strip Lights for Indoors > Under Cabinet Lighting
source_fields: <p>The Even-Glow® Series LED COB Strip Light creates a fully diffused, smooth line of light for applications around reflective surfaces such as granite countertops and tile floors. The high-density tape light has 156 LEDs per foot and delivers 274 lm/ft with 90+ high CRI lighting for quality color rendering. This low-profile tape light has an 8mm width and 3M™ adhesive backing for easy installation. The 24V strip is customizable, with cut points located every 1.2 inches. It is perfect for under-cabinet lighting, toe-kick lighting, and retail display cases.</p><div class="fntm bold pbs"><h3>Product Details:</h3></div><ul class="sc-applications"><li>Max Run: 32.8ft (10m)</li><li>Strip Width: 8mm</li><li>0-100% PWM dimmable</li><li>3M™ adhesive backing</li><li>Connection: 1.6ft pigtail</li><li>24 VDC input</li><li>ETL Listed; CE Compliant</li><li>5-year Warranty</li></ul>

models.title: American Lighting Microlink Under Cabinet Light, White, 3000K, 859 Lumens, 120V, 36 in.
source_fields:
American Lighting Microlink Under Cabinet Light — White & Feature SummaryThe American Lighting MLINK-120-30-36 is a white, under cabinet light designed for seamless integration into various environments. This fixture measures 36 inches in length and is constructed from durable materials, ensuring longevity and reliability. It operates at 120V and features an integrated LED light source, providing efficient illumination.Key Features

Dimensions: 36 in. length, 1 in. width, 0.7 in. height.

Voltage: 120V AC for direct connection to standard electrical systems.

Wattage: Consumes 14.4 watts, balancing power and efficiency.

Lumens: Outputs 859 lumens for bright task lighting.

Color Temperature: Fixed at 3000K, offering a warm white glow.

CRI: 90+ for accurate color rendering.

Lifespan: Rated for 50,000 hours, ensuring long-term performance.

Dimming: Compatible with most standard dimmers, allowing 5-100% light level adjustment.

Linkability: Supports up to 65.6 ft of continuous run, ideal for large installations.

Beam Angle: 120° for wide light distribution.
Core Design & ProfileThis fixture features a low-profile design, making it suitable for discreet installation in various settings. The housing is finished in white, complementing a wide range of interior styles. It is Dry Rated for indoor use.LED Illumination & PerformanceWith a lumen output of 859 and a wattage of 14.4, this fixture provides efficient lighting. The 3000K color temperature delivers a warm white light, enhancing visibility and ambiance.Power, Wiring & LinkabilityThis fixture is designed for direct wire installation, operating at 120V. It features a plug-and-play system for easy setup and supports linking up to 65.6 ft, accommodating extensive lighting layouts.Where This Fixture Works Best
Kitchen under cabinet lighting
Office workstations
Retail display shelves
Workshop task lighting
Closet illumination
What's Included
6 ft Power Connector Kit
4 in. mounting clips with screws

notes: Model intelligence is a compound workflow: category search, model extraction, spec-document capture, and model-page probing.
Blocked model pages are reported as evidence instead of silently dropping retailer coverage.
Category search-result model discovery used; search-derived prices are labeled as fallback evidence, not direct retailer API results.
